excluded: provider-side result counts unless a later collector retrieves them
supported: guarded asynchronous submission of full 4096-shot replacement packet/calibration templates to IBM Runtime
runtime job IDs are recorded for later result collection when submission succeeds

next_gate: Collect Runtime job results, validate calibration, then compute full 4096-shot hardware metrics.
objective: Determine whether PhaseWrap-RoPE's compact phase-wrap positional score has measurable robustness or auditability advantages on noisy quantum hardware, compared with matched positional-score encodings, under fixed circuit width.
